en: Oh that my head were waters, and my eyes a fountain of tears, that I might weep day and night for the slain of the daughter of my people!
zh: 但願我的頭是水井， 我的眼是淚的泉源； 我好為我同胞 中被殺的， 晝夜哭泣。

en: Oh that I had in the desert a travelers' lodging place, that I might leave my people and go away from them! For they are all adulterers, a company of treacherous men.
zh: 但願我在曠野有一個旅客住宿的地方， 好使我離開我的同胞， 可以離他們而去； 因為他們都是行姦淫的， 是行詭詐之徒。

en: They bend their tongue like a bow; falsehood and not truth has grown strong in the land; for they proceed from evil to evil, and they do not know me, declares the LORD.
zh: “他們彎曲舌頭，像彎弓一樣； 在這地得勢的是虛謊，不是誠實； 因為他們變本加厲地作惡， 連我也不認識。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Let everyone beware of his neighbor, and put no trust in any brother, for every brother is a deceiver, and every neighbor goes about as a slanderer.
zh: “你們各人要提防自己的鄰舍， 不要信靠兄弟； 因為每一個兄弟都在欺騙人， 每一個鄰舍都搬弄是非。

en: Everyone deceives his neighbor, and no one speaks the truth; they have taught their tongue to speak lies; they weary themselves committing iniquity.
zh: 他們各人都欺騙自己的鄰舍， 不說誠實話。 他們訓練自己的舌頭說謊話， 竭力作孽，以致他們不能回轉 。

en: Heaping oppression upon oppression, and deceit upon deceit, they refuse to know me, declares the LORD.
zh: 欺凌加上欺凌，詭詐加上詭詐 ， 他們不肯認識我。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: Therefore thus says the LORD of hosts: "Behold, I will refine them and test them, for what else can I do, because of my people?
zh: 因此，萬軍之耶和華這樣說： “看哪！我要熬煉他們，試驗他們； 因我子民 的罪惡，我還可以作甚麼呢？

en: Their tongue is a deadly arrow; it speaks deceitfully; with his mouth each speaks peace to his neighbor, but in his heart he plans an ambush for him.
zh: 他們的舌頭是殺人的利箭， 嘴裡說的是詭詐； 跟鄰舍說話滿口甜言蜜語， 心底裡卻設計陷害他。

en: Shall I not punish them for these things? declares the LORD, and shall I not avenge myself on a nation such as this?
zh: 我因這些事怎能不懲罰他們呢？ 像這樣的國家， 我怎能不親自報復呢？” 這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "I will take up weeping and wailing for the mountains, and a lamentation for the pastures of the wilderness, because they are laid waste so that no one passes through, and the lowing of cattle is not heard; both the birds of the air and the beasts have fled and are gone.
zh: 我要為眾山哭泣哀號， 為曠野的草場唱哀歌； 因為都已成為荒涼，無人經過， 也聽不到牲畜的叫聲； 無論空中的飛鳥，地上的走獸， 都逃走跑掉了。

en: I will make Jerusalem a heap of ruins, a lair of jackals, and I will make the cities of Judah a desolation, without inhabitant."
zh: “我要使耶路撒冷變成亂堆， 成為野狗的巢穴； 我要使猶大的城市荒涼， 無人居住。”

en: Who is the man so wise that he can understand this? To whom has the mouth of the LORD spoken, that he may declare it? Why is the land ruined and laid waste like a wilderness, so that no one passes through?
zh: 誰是智慧人可以解明這事？耶和華的口向誰說過，以致他可以傳講這事？為甚麼這地被毀壞，像曠野般荒涼，無人經過呢？

en: And the LORD says: "Because they have forsaken my law that I set before them, and have not obeyed my voice or walked in accord with it,
zh: 耶和華說：“這是因為他們離棄了我擺在他們面前的律法，不聽從我的話，沒有遵行我的律法；

en: but have stubbornly followed their own hearts and have gone after the Baals, as their fathers taught them.
zh: 反而隨從自己頑梗的心行事，照他們列祖所教訓的，隨從眾巴力。”

en: Therefore thus says the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel: Behold, I will feed this people with bitter food, and give them poisonous water to drink.
zh: 因此，萬軍之耶和華以色列的 神這樣說：“看哪！我要使這人民吃苦堇，喝毒水。

en: I will scatter them among the nations whom neither they nor their fathers have known, and I will send the sword after them, until I have consumed them."
zh: 我要把他們分散在列國中，就是他們和他們的列祖都不認識的列國；我要使刀劍追殺他們，直到把他們滅絕。”

en: Thus says the LORD of hosts: "Consider, and call for the mourning women to come; send for the skillful women to come;
zh: 萬軍之耶和華這樣說： “你們要思想， 要把唱哀歌的婦女召來， 把那些擅長哀哭的婦女請來；

en: let them make haste and raise a wailing over us, that our eyes may run down with tears and our eyelids flow with water.
zh: 叫他們趕快為我們舉哀， 使我們的眼流下眼淚， 使我們的眼皮湧出淚水。

en: For a sound of wailing is heard from Zion: 'How we are ruined! We are utterly shamed, because we have left the land, because they have cast down our dwellings.'"
zh: 因為從錫安可以聽到哀聲，說： ‘我們何等衰敗！ 我們多麼羞恥！ 因我們丟棄了這地， 我們的家園被拆毀了。’”

en: Hear, O women, the word of the LORD, and let your ear receive the word of his mouth; teach to your daughters a lament, and each to her neighbor a dirge.
zh: 婦女們哪！你們要聽耶和華的話， 你們的耳朵要領受他口中的話； 要教導你們的女兒舉哀， 各人要彼此學習哀歌。

en: For death has come up into our windows; it has entered our palaces, cutting off the children from the streets and the young men from the squares.
zh: 因為死亡從窗戶上來， 進入我們的堡壘； 要從街上剪除孩童， 從廣場上剪除年輕人。

en: Speak, "Thus declares the LORD: 'The dead bodies of men shall fall like dung upon the open field, like sheaves after the reaper, and none shall gather them.'"
zh: 你要這樣說 ： “人的屍體橫臥著， 像田野上的糞肥， 又像遺留在收割者後面的麥穗， 無人拾取。”

en: Thus says the LORD: "Let not the wise man boast in his wisdom, let not the mighty man boast in his might, let not the rich man boast in his riches,
zh: 耶和華這樣說：“智慧人不可誇耀自己的智慧，勇士不可誇耀自己的勇力，財主不可誇耀自己的財富。

en: but let him who boasts boast in this, that he understands and knows me, that I am the LORD who practices steadfast love, justice, and righteousness in the earth. For in these things I delight, declares the LORD."
zh: 誇口的卻要因了解我，認識我而誇口；認識我是耶和華，我在地上施行慈愛、公正、公義；因為我喜悅這些事。”這是耶和華的宣告。

en: "Behold, the days are coming, declares the LORD, when I will punish all those who are circumcised merely in the flesh-
zh: “看哪！日子快到 ，我必懲罰所有只在身體受過割禮，內心卻未受割禮的人，

en: Egypt, Judah, Edom, the sons of Ammon, Moab, and all who dwell in the desert who cut the corners of their hair, for all these nations are uncircumcised, and all the house of Israel is uncircumcised in heart."
zh: 就是埃及、猶大、以東、亞捫、摩押和所有剃除鬢髮，住在曠野的人；因為列國的人都沒有受過割禮，甚至以色列全家的內心也沒有受過割禮。”
